description_long: An adult pedestrian figure is depicted standing upright with both arms raised and extended diagonally upward, creating a dramatic V-shape above the head. The individual is dressed in a sleeveless top and straight-cut pants, with fitted shoes. The figure's hair is styled in a medium-length, straight cut that frames the face. The posture is rigid and symmetrical, with the arms forming a prominent visual feature. The overall build is average, and the clothing fits closely to the body, suggesting a casual, everyday urban appearance.
description: An adult standing upright with arms raised in a V-shape, wearing a sleeveless top and straight pants. The figure has a medium-length straight hairstyle and fitted shoes.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, sleeveless top, and both arms raised in a V-shape above the head.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the arm's upward extension, and the straight fit of the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the sleeveless top, and the symmetrical V-shape formed by the arms.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the side profile, arm extension, and the fit of the clothing along the body.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless casual top and straight-cut pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with both arms raised in a V-shape
